subject: [PATCH 5/6] mm/migrate_device: move softleaf_to_folio() inside device-private branch

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the call to softleaf_to_folio() inside a device-private branch in the mm/migrate_device.c file, ensuring that it is only called when necessary and preventing potential issues with bogus folio pointers or pfn_to_page validation. The change corrects an unsafe lookup condition in the non-device-private path and mirrors a similar fix for change_non_present_huge_pmd().
